name: Josidog Junior 15kg
shortDescription: Complete feed for growing dogs. A specifically adapted calcium/phosphorus ratio makes JosiDog Junior suitable for all young dogs from the age of eight weeks onwards up to adulthood.
description: Composition: Junior - Complete feed for growing dogs. Composition: whole grain corn; dried poultry protein; rice; poultry fat; beet fibre; hydrolysed poultry protein; minerals; ground chicory root (natural source of inulin); dried meat from the New Zealand green-lipped mussel (Perna canaliculus). Product Details: Complete feed for growing dogs. A specifically adapted calcium/phosphorus ratio makes JosiDog Junior suitable for all young dogs from the age of eight weeks onwards up to adulthood. The gluten-free formula with adjusted energy content supports moderate growth rates and strong bones needed for puppies.
